ocr_activation_disclosure.title: Arotake whakahohe Google OCR
ocr_activation_disclosure.intro: Ka whakamahi a toT i ngā ratonga Google mō te OCR. Mā te haere tonu ka whakatuwhera tō pūtirotiro kia whakamana ai koe i tēnei taupānga.
ocr_activation_disclosure.selected_files: Ko ngā kōnae anake ka kōwhiria e koe mō te OCR ka tukuna ki Google.
ocr_activation_disclosure.local_storage: Ka tiaki tēnei taupānga i ngā raraunga Google OAuth e whakahaerehia ana e te taupānga mō te OCR me te āhua tōkena Google paetata i tēnei tāutanga.
ocr_activation_disclosure.remote_cleanup: Whai muri i te kaweake, ka ngana te taupānga ki te tango i te tuhinga Google rangitahi i tō Google Drive.
ocr_activation_disclosure.disconnect: Ā muri ake ka taea te momotu mā Manakohanga > Momotu Google OCR.
ocr_activation_disclosure.close_aria: Katia te kōrero whakahohe Google OCR

apply_modal.title: Hoatu kuputuhi kua tangohia

single_file_heavy.case_a_title: He nui rawa te PDF katoa mō te OCR

single_file_heavy.case_b_title: He nui rawa te awhe kua hangaia mō te OCR
single_file_heavy.case_b_message: Ka hipa te PDF i hangaia mō te awhe kua tīpakohia i te tepe kaiwhakarato OCR ({providerLimitMb} MB). Kāore te kōnae i tukuatu. Ka taea e koe te hoki ki te tīpakonga whārangi, te whakamahi i te ara native, te whakatuwhera rānei i te kaiwhakamahere tiritahi hei wehe i te PDF katoa.

batch_ocr.quota_or_rate_limited: Kei roto i tēnei batch ētahi tūemi OCR, engari kua aukatia a OCR mō te wā poto e ngā tepe quota/rate. Tatari, ā, ngana anō i mua i te tīmata i te tango kupu.
batch_ocr.unavailable: He tūemi OCR kei tēnei rōpū, engari kāore a Google OCR e wātea ana ināianei. Mēnā kāore anō te OCR kia whakahohea, whakamahia Manakohanga > Whakahohe Google OCR. Ki te kore, tirohia te whakarite/mana takiuru OCR, kātahi ka ngana anō i mua i te tīmata i te rōpū.

entry.title: Whakamātautau tere pānui
entry.intro:
Ko tēnei whakamātautau hei whakatau tata i tō tere pānui tūturu mā tētahi wāhanga ārahi. Ka whakatuwhera te taupānga i te kuputuhi, ā, ka tatari kia pēhia e koe te Play (▶) i te Matapihi Mānu ina rite koe ki te tīmata. Kia tīmata te whakamātautau, kaua e pēhi Pause (⏸) kia mutu rā anō tō pānui: ka whakamutu te Pause i te whakamātautau; kāore e whakatā i te matawā. Whakamahia Stop/Reset (⏹) anake mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki te whakakore i te whakamātautau. Muri iho, ka taea e koe te arotake i ngā pātai mārama mēnā kei roto i te kuputuhi, ā, i te mutunga, te waihanga preset i te hua.
I mua i te tīmatanga, kia mōhio ko ēnei kuputuhi whakamātautau e tono ana i te 5 ki te 15 meneti o te aro pūmau, kāore he whakararuraru.
Ka whakamahi tēnei pool i ngā kuputuhi poto, nō reira me tūpato ki te whakamāori i te hua. Kaua e whakawhānui tika ki ngā kuputuhi roa, i reira ka uru mai ngā āhuatanga pai pērā i te rere me te horopaki, me ngā āhuatanga kino pērā i te whakahoki ā-hinengaro me te ngenge.
entry.start_current_text_button: Tīmata ki te kuputuhi o nāianei
entry.pool_exhausted_message: Kāore he kōnae whakamātautau kāore anō kia whakamahia. Tautuhi anō i te pool, tāpiri rānei i ētahi atu kōnae.
entry.visible_empty_bundled_hidden_message: Kei te hunaia ngā kōnae whakamātautau kua hangaia ki roto i tēnei wā, ā, kāore he kōnae whakamātautau kitea kāore anō kia whakamahia e toe ana. Whakaaturia anō ngā kōnae hanga-roto, kawemai rānei i ētahi atu kōnae kia haere tonu ai.
entry.close_aria: Katia te kōrero whakamātautau tere pānui
entry.start_random_confirm: Ka tuhi tēnei ki runga i te kuputuhi o nāianei mā tētahi kuputuhi matapōkere e tika ana nō te pool. Me haere tonu?
entry.reset_confirm: Ka tautuhi anō tēnei i te pool whakamātautau katoa, ā, ka tohu anō i ōna kōnae katoa hei kāore anō kia whakamahia. Me haere tonu?

tooltips.show_bundled_entries: Whakaurua ngā kōnae whakamātautau tīmatanga kua oti te whakauru ki te taupānga ki te puna
tooltips.get_more_files: Tiki kōnae whakamātautau anō i te kōpaki Google Drive
tooltips.import_files: Kawemai kōnae whakamātautau i tō pūrere
tooltips.reset_pool: Tautuhi anō i te pool whakamātautau
tooltips.start_random_text: Tīmata i te whakamātautau ki tētahi kuputuhi matapōkere e tika ana nō te pool
tooltips.start_current_text: Tīmata i te whakamātautau ki te kuputuhi o nāianei

import.import_summary: Kua oti te kawemai. Kua kawemai: {imported}. Kua peke i ngā tārua: {skippedDuplicates}. I rahua te manatoko: {failedValidation}. I rahua ngā tāurunga pūranga: {failedArchiveEntries}. I rahua ngā tuhinga: {failedWrites}.

import_conflict.title: Kawemai kōnae
import_conflict.message: Kua tīariari kē ētahi kōnae kawemai i te pool. Me pēhea te whakahaere i ngā tārua?
import_conflict.detail: Kua tīariari kē ngā ingoa kōnae ūnga e {count} i te pool.

prestart.reminder: Pēhia te Play (▶) i te Matapihi Mānu ina rite koe ki te tīmata. Kia tīmata te whakamātautau, kaua e pēhi Pause (⏸) kia mutu rā anō tō pānui: ka whakakapi te Pause i te whakamātautau; kāore e whakatā i te matawā. Pēhia Stop/Reset (⏹) anake mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki te whakakore i te whakamātautau.

questions.title: Ngā pātai mārama pānui
questions.intro: He kōwhiringa noa te whakautu i ēnei pātai mārama pānui, ā, kāore e pā ki tō kaute whakamutunga. He āwhina noa kia aromatawai koe i te uaua o te kuputuhi me te āhei rānei o tō tere me tō kāhua pānui ki te tae ki tētahi taumata mārama taketake. Kāore ō whakautu e tiakina, e tukuna rānei ki ngā kaiwhakawhanake, ki tētahi atu rānei.
questions.random_value: Kaute tūmanako i raro i te matapae matapōkere: {percentage}
questions.incomplete_warning: Me whakautu ngā pātai katoa i mua i te aromatawai.
questions.chance_at_least_observed: Tūponotanga kia whiwhi i te kaute nei, neke atu rānei, mā te matapae matapōkere: {percentage}

alerts.unavailable: Kāore te āheinga whakamātautau tere pānui e wātea ana.
alerts.precondition_blocked: Ka taea anake te tīmata i te whakamātautau tere pānui i tētahi āhua tau o te taupānga. Katia ngā matapihi tuarua, ā, kia mutu te matawā.
alerts.pool_error: I puta he hapa i te taki i te pool whakamātautau tere pānui.
alerts.no_matching_files: Kāore he kōnae whakamātautau kāore anō kia whakamahia e ōrite ana ki te tīpakonga o nāianei.
alerts.visible_empty_bundled_hidden: Kei te hunaia ngā kōnae whakamātautau kua hangaia ki roto, ā, kāore he kōnae whakamātautau kitea kāore anō kia whakamahia e wātea ana i tēnei wā. Whakaaturia anō ngā kōnae hanga-roto, kawemai rānei i ētahi atu kōnae kia haere tonu ai.
alerts.current_text_empty: Kāore he kuputuhi o nāianei. Uta, patohia rānei he kuputuhi i mua i te tīmata i te whakamātautau ki te kuputuhi o nāianei.
alerts.result_invalid: Kāore i taea te huri i te hua whakamātautau hei WPM tika. I mutu te rere me te kore whakatuwhera i te modal preset.
alerts.result_unavailable: Kāore i taea te whakaatu i te hua tere pānui. I haere tonu te rere.
alerts.preset_unavailable: Kāore i taea te whakatuwhera i te modal preset i muri i te whakamātautau.
alerts.questions_unavailable: Kāore i taea te whakatuwhera i te modal pātai mārama. I mutu te rere i mua i te waihanga preset.
alerts.pool_import_failed: Kāore i taea te kawemai i ngā kōnae whakamātautau tere pānui.
alerts.pool_import_state_cleanup_failed: Kua kawemai ngā kōnae test tere pānui, engari kāore i taea te whakahōu katoa i te tūnga o te pool.
alerts.start_failed: Kāore i taea te tīmata i te whakamātautau tere pānui.
alerts.cancelled: Kua whakakorea te whakamātautau tere pānui.
alerts.cancelled_window_closed: Kua whakakorea te whakamātautau tere pānui nā te katia o tētahi o ngā matapihi wātū.

preset_modal.heading_edit: Whakatika i te preset kua tīpakohia
preset_modal.name: Ingoa:
preset_modal.char_count: E {remaining} ngā pūāhua e toe ana
preset_modal.hint: Ka tiakina ngā preset ritenga ki ngā tautuhinga kaiwhakamahi.

alerts.not_found: Kāore te preset kua tīpakohia i kitea i te keteroki.
alerts.delete_error: I puta he hapa i te muku i te preset. Tirohia te papatohu.
alerts.restore_error: I puta he hapa i te whakahoki preset. Tirohia te papatohu.
alerts.open_folder_unsupported: Kāore e taea te whakatuwhera i te kōpaki preset i tēnei taiao.
alerts.open_folder_error: I puta he hapa i te ngana ki te whakatuwhera i te kōpaki preset. Tirohia te papatohu.
alerts.open_default_folder_failed: Kāore i taea te whakatuwhera i te kōpaki preset taunoa. Tirohia te papatohu mō ngā taipitopito.
alerts.unavailable: Kāore te kōrero preset i te wātea i tēnei build o te taupānga.
alerts.open_error: I puta he hapa i te whakatuwheratanga o te kōrero preset. Tirohia te papatohu.
alerts.name_empty: Kāore e āhei kia noho kau te ingoa.
alerts.wpm_invalid: Me noho te WPM hei tau i waenga i te {min} me te {max}.
alerts.create_error: I puta he hapa i te waihanga i te preset. Tirohia te papatohu.
alerts.edit_error: I puta he hapa i te whakatika i te preset. Tirohia te papatohu.
alerts.process_error: I puta he hapa i te tukatuka i te preset. Tirohia te papatohu.

browser_extension.title: Toronga pūtirotiro
browser_extension.subtitle: Reading Time
browser_extension.availability: Kei te wātea i Chrome ināianei. Ka tae mai ētahi atu pūtirotiro ākuanei.
browser_extension.chrome_store_aria: Whakatuwhera i te whārangi Chrome Web Store o te toronga

alerts.modal_open_blocked: Kāore e taea te whakatuwhera i te kōrero toronga pūtirotiro i tēnei wā.

info.missing_content: Kāore he ihirangi e wātea ana mō '{name}'.
